item.title: States' Rights to do what, Nikki?
item.description: https://twitter.com/JoeBiden/status/1740221284284256645 https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/nikki-haley-civil-war-slavery-b2470435.html “What was the cause of the United States Civil War?” the former South Carolina Governor and UN Ambassador was asked by a man at her town hall event on Wednesday night. Ms Haley paused for a moment before joking, “Well, don’t come with an easy question”. “I think the cause of the Civil War was basically how government was going to run, the freedoms, and what people could and couldn’t do. What do you think the cause of the Civil War was?” she asked. The man, who subsequently told reporters his name was Patrick, replied he wasn’t the one running for president. “I mean, I think it always comes down to the role of government,” Ms Haley said. “We need to have capitalism, we need to have economic freedom. We need to make sure that we do all things so that individuals have the liberties so that they can have freedom of speech, freedom of religion, freedom to do or be anything they want to be without government getting in the way.” “In the year 2023, it’s astonishing to me that you can answer that question without mentioning the word ‘slavery’,” the voter said. “What do you want me to say about slavery? Next question,” Ms Haley said. The criticism of her reply was swift, with President Joe Biden simply tweeting: “It was about slavery.”
item.dc:creator: Shewy92

item.title: there are only slight Cherenkov radiations, you'll be fine
item.dc:creator: piconuke

item.title: Michael Harriot gives some perspective on Nikki Haley
item.description:
With all the BS leading up to the election and her refusing to admit that slavery was the root cause of the American Civil War, Mr. Harriot retweeted this thread from June, and since I didn't post it then for some reason, here it is now. https://twitter.com/michaelharriot/status/1669915356524163073
https://www.theatlantic.com/national/archive/2012/12/in-southern-towns-segregation-academies-are-still-going-strong/266207/ https://www.history.com/topics/1960s/orangeburg-massacre
https://www.salon.com/2015/07/08/south_carolina_does_not_do_subtle_racism_my_life_inside_a_segregation_academy/
https://twitter.com/michaelharriot/status/1669915356524163073 There's never a bad time to remind people how important it is to vote in every election, especially the local ones, because that is the easiest way to make sure such evil people never get their foot in the door.
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: 48+2 Memes
item.dc:creator: Aloysiust

item.title: Bottom shelf story time.
item.description:
I got in trouble by the Burger King manager today. I do not usually eat there, nor would I ever spend my own actual money there, but my mother gave us a $25 gift card, so that's what we got for lunch. I ordered in the drive thru. Our total was $23.79
There were cars in front of me and behind me. When I pulled to the window, she handed me the drinks, and I handed her my gift card. She tried to swipe it a couple of times and said it didn't work. I told her I had never used it before, and she looked at me and my green hair like I must have been lying. I hesitated for a long ass minute before reluctantly handing her my actual debit card. She swiped it. Goodbye IRL $23.79. She handed me the bag of "food" and I pulled into a parking spot to check the balance. I called the number on the back, and the card did, in fact, have $25.00 on it. So, I mustered up the courage to go inside and see if I could get it fixed. When I walked in, the same girl who couldn't run the card greeted me with a less than approachable attitude, (I am already riddled in anxiety because I hate confrontational situations).
She says "How can I help you." She legit said it with a period. She did not want to help me. I said, "I'm so sorry to bother you, but I just called the number on the back, and there is $25 on the card. I really don't have money to be spending on fast food right now which is why I was trying to use the gift card." She took the card, looked at me, and said "The reader won't process the card." I looked around to make sure I didn't accidentally stumble into a McDonalds, and sure enough, I said "but...it's a Burger King card though." (Like where else can I spend it if not here?) She rolled her eyes and grabbed her manager.
I had to re-explain the situation, and I'm vibrating with anxiety at this point. The manager asked if I had my debit card. I handed it to her. She asked "WHY DID YOU PAY WITH YOUR DEBIT CARD?" [I am imploding inside, like why are you mad at me]
She takes my debit card, does some voodoo magic in the back, returns, and says "the money should be back on your card in 3-5 business days." THEN she took the gift card and said "NOW, let me see if I can get this card to work. Wait here."
So I waited...for like 3 minutes...then I was like. Hell, she can call the same number I did and find there's $25 on the gift card. Why am I waiting for this? So she can keep being mad at me longer? So I left.
and that's why I will never eat BK again.
You know what? Fuck all #FastFood though. I have never eaten fast food without buyer's remorse.
@@HileyNoteson McYoooooooooo
Still the best canvas I have ever painted.
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Taxi Bear getting her fourth meal tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: A pose a day: two women hugging, holding hands, and smiling
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. Hope this pose helps you! Happy drawing! FP Edit: hey! Imgur was being weird and I wasn't able to update the text here but it's working now?? Anyway, thanks for the love! If you want to support what I do my Patreon is just $1/mo: Patreon.com/adorkastock TYSM and happy new year! #Art #AdorkaStock #Reference #Artist User tags: @HaikuSorrow @Brestaris @The9mm @Veraatje01 @thegraphiteknight @CanOnlySayYes @SmolTenk @5GFPLaqZ4nAy2QwrqOEI @Nautas @LadyAzzura @Noooooozzzzzzzz @BeanTootsAreBest @pumpkinknight @sniggly5212 @TheMemeForge @lgwingnut @Talon83 @KootchieKoo @roeliebobs @TheDizzyToast @pangalgargblast @IndianCowboy @cojamist @BobbyBobbston @BenderRodriguz1010 @Netcat @ScurvyMI @BrutalAnalSeepage @AlmostPerfectComment @CouldntCakeLess @Hedgehoglet @iDrawStuff @PprHrt @Genuphobatastic @brandopolaf @TorisArt @Wormwoodworms @HikariShade @Like2Fox @ICGer
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: Images of Note: 9.9 on the cunter scale
item.description:
Iceland.png
This kind of logic fucking concerns me because, fun fact, starving people aren't going to pull themselves up by their bootstraps because that is literally an analogy for something that is impossible. People need shelter and food, what is the point in civilization if those things are not readily accessible?
Listen, there is a difference between "looking pretty" and "having a nice outfit" and "serving cunt".
WE BALL FUCKER
nya :3c
Thing is though, Shadow the Hedgehog is not a Cosmic Horror
This is currently my favorite meme, the wilder the characters the better. Give me Toby from Thomas the Tank Engine and Dr T'Ana from Star Trek Lower Decks.
It's surprising how many people believe you "can't say Merry Christmas anymore".
Hell yeah
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: "The evidence here demonstrates (insurrection) occurred at the behest of, & with the knowledge and support of (trump). The U.S. Constitution does not tolerate an assault on the foundations of our government, & [Maine law]requires me to act in response”
item.description: I have gifted this article to you, IMGUR Community: https://wapo.st/485hl1n Although two states have ruled that trump is ineligible to run for presiden the chances are this will die in the Supreme Court. Therefore, it is imperative to make sure you are registered to vote and exercise that right in the upcoming election. Register to vote and/or check the status of your voter registration by going here: IWillVote.com Be sure to vote in every election, including the “small” ones. The “big” politicians often got their start by winning the small elections. You can help weed out the bad ones early. Related: https://imgur.com/gallery/bsxxZKJ
item.dc:creator: SisterMidnight
